notes: stddev figures measure cross-scenario variance (3 different prompt difficulties), not within-scenario stochastic reliability (which would require multiple runs of the same eval). Do not interpret ±29% as a repeatability measure.

eval-general-task (ID 2): the output .md files for both configurations share the same git blob — both agents had access to SKILL.md on disk in the worktree and produced byte-for-byte identical logs. This eval contributes zero discriminating power on log quality. The +17pp delta is driven entirely by eval-minimal-context (ambiguity handling) and eval-submodule-implementation (time/token efficiency).
